name: io.github.br0ski777/seo-analyzer
title: SEO Page Analyzer
description: Complete SEO audit of any URL. Extracts title, meta description, OG tags, Twitter Card, headings, links, images alt text, Schema.org, word count, load time, and returns a score 0-100 with prioritized issues. Use for SEO audits, on-page analysis, or pre-publish checks.
